title: Opening for Production Engineer at Kirloskar Electric

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Kirloskar Electric
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Kirloskar Electric in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kirloskar Electric:
Kirloskar Electric is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kirloskar Electric!
